name: Empanadas De Fruta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt, and sugar in a bowl. Add shortening and mix well.
2. Gradually add beaten egg to water, then pour the mixture into the dry ingredients. The dough should be soft but not sticky.
3. Form small balls of dough. Roll each ball out to a 5-inch diameter and about 1/8 inch thick.
4. Place a heaping teaspoon of filling on half of the rolled-out dough. Fold the other half over and press the edges together.
5. Pinch the edges between your thumb and forefinger, giving the dough a half-turn.
6. Fry in deep fat until golden brown. Drain excess oil before serving.
7. To prepare the fruit filling, add enough water to cover the dried fruit and raisins. Cook on low heat until tender. Stir in sugar, spices, and nuts until well combined. A 21-ounce can of fruit pie filling may be used instead.
